scenario.name: boots_and_reveals_saucer
scenario.description: the saucer is the Mode 7 BG: it boots ($7E:E000=SFDB), the heartbeat advances, and during the REVEAL the affine matrix scales the whole plane so the on-screen saucer grows from a tiny speck to full (the boss-is-BG scaling invariant). The player sprite (OAM slot 0) composites in front once the fight begins.

scenario.name: hp_hud_renders_over_saucer
scenario.description: the saucer HP bar is a row of 8 segment sprites (OAM slots 17-24) drawn at the top of the screen with priority 2, so it composites IN FRONT of the Mode 7 saucer BG. At full HP all 8 segments are the lit tile (SPR_HP_LIT = 6).

scenario.name: player_composites_in_the_fight
scenario.description: once the fight begins the player gunship is an OBJ sprite (OAM slot 0, SPR_PLAYER_T0 = 0) fixed at the low band y=184, composited in front of the Mode 7 saucer BG. No input, so it stays at its spawn column x=120; the HP HUD is still full (all 8 pips the lit tile 6).

scenario.name: lunge_apex_fires_the_beam
scenario.description: the LUNGE reaches the NEAR apex and the saucer fires its beam: a column of SPR_BEAM (tile 8) segments in OAM slots 1-16, locked to the idle player's body-centre column (x = p_x+4 = 124) and stacked from the underside emitter (y=BEAM_Y0=56) down. Slot 1 is the top segment. The beam only exists at the lunge apex, so its render is a proxy for the whole approach->near->fire cycle.

scenario.name: idle_lose_shows_the_defeat_card
scenario.description: left idle, the locked beam drains the player to 0 HP -> LOSE -> RESULT, which shows a DEFEAT card over a DIMMED (not black) scene — the fix for the old pure-black hold. The card's first glyph 'D' (SPR_G_D = tile 0x22) renders at OAM slot 29, y=CARD_Y=100, past the stable 0..28 map. (The win card would put 'V' = 0x2D there instead, so the tile disambiguates the outcome.)
